This guide covers installation, basic configuration, and your first memory operations."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Prerequisites"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Python 3.10 or higher"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"pip or uv package manager"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"(Optional) An OpenAI API key for embedding generation"}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Install"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"pip install mnemosyne","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Or with uv (recommended for speed):"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"uv add mnemosyne","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Verify Installation"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"python -c \"import mnemosyne; print(mnemosyne.__version__)\"","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"First Memory Operation"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Memory\n\n# Initialize memory\nmem = Memory()\n\n# Store a memory\nmem.remember(\n  content=&quot;The user prefers dark mode and uses Vim keybindings.&quot;,\n  tags=[&quot;preferences&quot;, &quot;ui&quot;]\n)\n\n# Recall relevant memories\nresults = mem.recall(&quot;What are the user's interface preferences?&quot;)\nfor r in results:\n  print(r.content)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"What's behavior"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Explore the ",["$","a",null,{"href":"/docs/architecture/beam-overview","children":"BEAM Architecture"}]," to understand how memory works"]}],"\n"]}]],[["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/06qv3~~e._cb6.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-1",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0ch_p3vkb0uw2.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-2",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0fekzj03ltn5y.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-3",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0pqew2nbfoy2f.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-4",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/07.05twov8012.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-5",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/113wy2s~ukj5p.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-6",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0se1rt9lzyib_.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-7",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0e1gsufr5shdc.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-8",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/13n60-fppanm4.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-9",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0g~f0923b0wjv.js","async":true}]],["$","$L3",null,{"children":["$","$4",null,{"name":"Next.MetadataOutlet","children":"$@5"}]}]]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"QQSqVRZ0L1fJQFST1lZ0f"}
